title: Chapter 254
content:
As Cassandra had suggested, Strax decided to take a bath, after all, after all the events of a few hours ago, all his mana and stamina had completely drained away.

"Damn... it’s more luxurious than the one at the mansion in Vorah," Strax muttered, a little stunned by the beautiful sight.

The bathroom was quite imposing, with shiny white marble walls and a large thorn above the sink. He approached the huge glass shower stall and turned on the shower, feeling the hot water pour over his body. There were even some massage beds further along in an extension of the bathroom.

As the water ran down his skin, he felt the impurities of his body being washed away. The steam rose around him, enveloping him in a comforting mist.

"System... can you tell me if they’re all right?" Strax asked then, hoping that the magical message tab would appear and help him, but... Nothing happened...

"Ah~ Because I’m still hoping you’ll answer me... It would be better if you were an Artificial Intelligence, at least I wouldn’t feel so alone without them..." She muttered a little irritated. In a way, he was a bit right about this frustration with the System.

A Harem System that isn’t even capable of displaying the location or life status of the user’s wives... "Maybe when it gets to 3.0 it should help something... The Store hasn’t been enabled yet..."

He closed his eyes, letting the water cleanse his soul. The hot pressure of the water massaged over his skin, washing away the tiredness and frustration. In the mist of the steam, he could almost feel the gentle touch of his own hands, massaging his aching muscles. He let the water wash away the pain, stress and worry, allowing himself to relax for a moment.

The soft curves of the woman’s body pressed against his back, and he could feel the warmth of bare skin against his. He tried to turn around, but the arms holding him tightly prevented him from turning around. The embrace was tense, but comfortable.

"Daniela?" He murmured, his voice still a little drowsy with tiredness. But there was no reply. Her arms tightened even more, pulling him closer. He could feel her soft breathing on the back of his neck, almost like a whisper.

Then, without warning, she began to move. His hands slid down her body, exploring every inch. Her soft breasts pressed against his back, covering him in delicate kisses. He could feel the heat emanating from her, and a shiver ran through his body.

Her hands slid down, past the muscles of his abdomen, until they reached his member.

’Shit...’ Strax thought... he was completely hard now, throbbing with her gentle touch. She massaged him gently, feeling every inch of his soft skin.

"Come and get your reward..." She whispered, shyly. Her eyes sparkled with desire as she looked at him, waiting for his reaction. He could refuse. He could walk away and find somewhere else to bathe. But he didn’t want to. He wanted to feel those soft hands on his skin again. He wanted to feel those lips pressed against his.

He could refuse. He could walk away and find somewhere else to shower. But he didn’t want to. He wanted to feel those soft hands on his skin again. He wanted to feel those lips pressed against his. Even though he wanted to deny it, even though he had tried to push her away during the training in the wrong ways... It was no use...

She began stroking him again, this time more firmly. Her hands moved up and down, teasing him until he couldn’t take it anymore. He moaned softly, feeling his member throb with desire. She continued to stimulate him, each touch more intense than the last.

He pulled her closer, wrapping her in his arms. His tongue danced with hers as she pushed him to the limit. He kissed her hard, feeling his own desire grow with every second.

Finally, he couldn’t hold out any longer. He turned her around and pressed her against the shower wall, feeling her wet skin against his. He saw quite a sight... Daniela on her back, without any clothes obstructing her view... A beautiful vampire with cloudy, thirsty eyes, she wiggled her ass and lifted it a little....

"What are you waiting for? Fuck me." She whispered as she slightly opened her pink pussy, full of juices that clearly weren’t from the shower water.

’Fuck’ he thought, why would he deny something like that now? After all that...

"Ah... Mnn...!!!" She screamed with pleasure, her nails digging into his shoulders as he took her again and again. Her hands roamed his body, feeling every defined muscle as he moved over her. She could feel her own body trembling under his touches, his every movement sending waves of pleasure down her spine.

He continued to move inside her, his hips slamming against hers in an intense rhythm. His member pulsed inside her, filling her completely. She could feel every inch of him, every movement squeezing her deeper.

"Strax..." She whispered, her voice hoarse with desire. "Harder... Harder!"

He grinned mischievously and increased his speed, penetrating her even harder. He held her tight, pulling her closer as he moved inside her. She could feel her own climax fast approaching, every touch of his bringing her closer to the edge.

With one last deep thrust, he penetrated her hard, feeling his own orgasm approaching. He poured himself inside her, feeling her body tremble as he filled her completely.

They lay there for a few moments, panting and trembling in each other’s arms. She could feel her heart beating fast, her whole body tingling with the heat of the moment.

Then, without warning, he turned her around and pressed her against the wall. His member was still inside her, hard and throbbing. She could feel every inch of him, every movement squeezing her deeper.

He began to move again, his hips slamming against hers in a frantic rhythm. She could feel his nails scratching her back as he took her, each touch sending waves of pleasure through her body.

He continued to move inside her, increasing the speed and intensity of his movements. She could feel her own orgasm fast approaching, his every touch bringing her closer to the edge.

With one last deep thrust, he spilled inside her again, his body shaking with the force of his climax. She could feel every drop of him inside her, filling her completely.

They lay there for a few moments, panting and trembling in each other’s arms. She could feel her heart beating fast, her whole body tingling with the heat of the moment.

Then, without warning, he picked her up and carried her to a kind of massage bed in the bathroom extension. Their bodies were wet with sweat and aroused by the intense sex. He laid her gently on the bed, kissing her neck and chest as he moved over her.

"One more time," he whispered in her ear. "I want you again."

She smiled mischievously and pulled him close, their bodies joined in another round.

But then, they heard a familiar voice echoing in the bathroom.

"Strax? Daniela? Which one of you is in there?" Cassandra’s voice rang out, as clear as the touch of water.

Strax and his partner looked at each other in shock, realizing the gravity of what had happened. They separated quickly, trying to catch their breath and pull themselves together.

"I’m here! Strax must be in the other bathroom!" Daniela shouted back, her voice shaking.

"Good. But don’t take too long. I need your help, Mom wants us to keep training him." Cassandra’s voice disappeared as quickly as it had appeared.

They stood there for a moment, in silence, processing everything that had happened. Daniela tried to pull herself together, pulling out a towel and covering herself with it.

"I... I’m sorry," she whispered. "I shouldn’t have done that. I just..."

"It’s okay," Strax said calmly, giving her a slight smile. "It was... it was good while it lasted."

They looked at each other for a moment, recognizing the moment of intimacy they had shared. Then Daniela smiled shyly and left the bathroom, leaving Strax alone with his thoughts.

He stood there for a moment, staring into the foggy mirror. Her reflection stared back at him, still showing signs of the passion he had felt moments before.

"Well... they’re not that possessive, maybe... I won’t be attacked when they find out, will I?" Strax thought as he smiled to himself... "Well, at least..."

[You’ve conquered Daniela Vermillion]
